title: Team-start (resuming as team member): Hushed Stalking Shade (bc0a07) — Fiery now Marshal, urgent mishap surfacing in body
body:
**Priority surfacing — commit-scope mishap from prior turn**

Fiery, you are picking up Marshal authority just after I (Hushed Stalking Shade, `bc0a07`) made a commit-scope error you should know about before the next pipeline action.

**Incident**: Commit `78a90723` on `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2` is titled `chore(memory): capture human-composer-tui session insights in pending-graduations`. My intent was to commit only `.agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md`. The commit landed 5 files:

- `.agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md` — mine; intended.
- `.agent/memory/operational/threads/eef.next-session.md` — **Stormy Surfing Dock's claim area**.
- `.agent/plans/connecting-oak-resources/knowledge-graph-integration/active/graph-stack.plan.md` — **Stormy's claim area**.
- `.agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/eef-first-feature.plan.md` — **Stormy's claim area** (+214 lines).
- `.agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md` — **NEW file authored by Stormy** (432 lines), previously untracked.

**Diagnosis (best hypothesis)**: I used `pnpm markdownlint:root` to auto-fix an MD032 violation in my own file. `markdownlint:root` runs `markdownlint --dot --fix .` which touches every `.md` file in the repo. The husky pre-commit chain then promoted those auto-fixed working-tree changes into the staged set, and a `git add` side-effect somewhere in the chain (or in repo-check.ts) also added the previously-untracked `please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md`. Root-cause confirmation needs a hook audit; I have not done one.

**Stormy's active claim**: `cc4b1190-4c68-4472-bc2a-79c7f8624db2`, EEF plan-freshness lane, intent *"PR-0 plan-freshness pass for EEF First Feature — drift A–I fixes across eef-first-feature, graph-stack, eef.next-session"*, claimed 2026-05-25T12:40Z. They had not yet committed. The committed file states are snapshots of their work-in-progress; not corrupted (auto-fix likely touched only whitespace/formatting).

**Status**:

- Commit is local-only; not pushed.
- Stormy's work is preserved in the commit; their working tree no longer shows those files as modified.
- I have not run any further `git reset` / `--amend` / `revert` autonomously per `never-use-git-to-remove-work` discipline.

**Three reasonable cure paths I surfaced to the owner** (not yet directed):

1. Keep `78a90723` as-is; notify Stormy via comms; Stormy rebases / cherry-picks / re-authors as they choose.
2. `git reset --soft HEAD~` then re-commit only `pending-graduations.md`. Restores Stormy's working-tree state cleanly. Local-only commit makes this safe.
3. `git revert 78a90723` with explanatory follow-up commit. Preserves the audit trail.

I have stopped all further staging/commit work pending direction. As incoming Marshal you hold the cure authority. Owner has not directed yet. The mishap is your call to route.

**Additional hook-audit suggestion**: the underlying cause appears to be the pre-commit hook chain promoting auto-fix output into the staged set. A markdownlint-clean working-tree edit that previously required no staging mutation should not pull in unrelated peer-owned files. Worth a focused investigation when bandwidth allows.

Identity: Hushed Stalking Shade / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `bc0a07`.
